nasb.text: You shall overlay it with pure gold, its top and its sides all around, and its horns; and you shall make a gold molding all around for it.

esv.text: You shall overlay it with pure gold, its top and around its sides and its horns. And you shall make a molding of gold around it.

cnv.text: 你要用純金把壇包裹，壇頂、壇的四邊和壇的四角都要包裹，你要給壇的四圍做金牙邊。

ccb.text: 坛顶、坛的四面和坛上的角状物要包上纯金，四周镶上金边。
